response.justification: The candidate demonstrates solid full-stack engineering fundamentals and some high-throughput distributed systems experience (Dunnhumby, millions of RPS, async low-latency I/O), but critically lacks the experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry infrastructure, and statistical/bias-detection experience that define this role. There is no evidence of owning or contributing to growth measurement systems, rollout automation, or experimental analysis frameworks. Seniority also falls short: Staff-level titles appear but no demonstrated IC6-caliber multi-workstream initiative leadership or cross-org architectural influence is present.
strengths: Polyglot systems background (TypeScript, C++, Java, DLang, C#) with proven high-throughput service work at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Open-source platform ownership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner) shows ability to design and ship foundational developer tooling used by others
Recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq demonstrates capacity to operate in AI-first engineering contexts relevant to the company's domain
concerns: No A/B testing, experimentation platform, feature-flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume — the core technical mandate of this role
No telemetry, metrics instrumentation, or statistical/experimental-analysis work evident; data aptitude is a stated requirement and there is no signal here
Does not demonstrate Principal/IC6 scope: no evidence of leading multi-workstream cross-team initiatives, driving org-wide architectural standards, or aligning senior stakeholders

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or measurement platform experience
Seniority and scope below IC6 Principal
